textByHashes.f46cc41dfa0c91f574154ebcda263bf77787cdb1: Good day, good day. Come to admire the new parrot aviary have we?
textByHashes.8aa3125058f05ec7fe403f856f75930c6c33202b: Just recently. It would have been sooner, but some wretch thought it would be amusing to replace their drinking water with vodka. The vet had to nurse them back to health for weeks!
textByHashes.e63e0036a6af8a8990cd8c2051113ae466dea98d: Well, fruit and grain mostly. I try to give them a balanced diet, but their favourite treat is pineapple chunks.
textByHashes.86e470138e65bb7ab8038a8b88d1d7a590224626: Hey! What are you doing with that parrot?
textByHashes.db6f454bf2d45d23c1bad0e9f869118dd9505d6b: It looks drunk! You should NEVER feed alcohol to a parrot!
textByHashes.2419ab1d3702dee7199d54d1f46eb1fa6764c943: Oh, thank you! We're ever so busy here at the Zoo.
textByHashes.1c2421247c13d63a2eff55d3c4592578a8335ab3: No, I've got another late night here.
textByHashes.95cc12cb4248a1376a3e6f34d8cbea6db7e4388d: Ol' bluebeak's got the flu again!
textByHashes.c900560d4496d857ecd27f82d879e8d840dffcfe: Well, as long as he hasn't caught anything from that evil chicken.
